ANDERSON HOLDS TAX CUT POSSIBLE; Secretary Says Step Would Be Taken if Needed to Aid Economy -- Hearings Set
Anderson says Adm is ready to act to prevent slump from worsening, with tax cuts if necessary, TV int

Insurance Leader Expects Rise In Output and Stock Prices Soon; C. M. Shanks, Head of Prudential, Sees Steel, Textile Gains Within Month, General Upturn Before Mid-Year TRADE RECOVERY EXPECTED SOON
C M Shanks predicts output rise within mo
Santa Fe's Profits Fell 57% in January Below the '57 Level

EXECUTIVES HERE LOOK FOR UPTURN; 30% in Poll Predict Gains in 1958 and 47% Expect to Equal 1957 Volume BUSINESS UP THIS YEAR Commerce-Industry Group Calls Talk of a Downturn Contrary to Facts
Commerce and Indus Assn survey of business execs finds 30.2% see '58 uptrend, with 47.4% expecting it to be as good as '57; exec vp Miley sees pessimism belied

BUILDER DOUBTS AID IN RECESSION; Hopes That Construction Will Spearhead an Upturn Called Too Optimistic
N G Severin warns home bldg upturn may not pull nation out of recession; sees rising costs biggest problem; FNMA pres Baughman discusses agency's role
